goal: Implement only the T0708 local fail-closed Patch Lifecycle and operations policy: bind a candidate to the exact last verified commit, deterministically classify public MooMooAU change paths into patch surfaces and protected-canary impacts, require complete immutable supply-chain and recovery evidence, combine capacity, active Kill, reconciliation, Timeline, public-evidence, cost and scope stops, emit an aggregate FREEZE or owner-approval eligibility decision, and provide a read-only no-Secret policy workflow without applying, deploying or rolling back anything.
scope: cumulative Stage 7 local mechanisms through the T0707 digest-only Recovery Drill
exact T0707 predecessor and Local Synthetic versus Protected GitHub Actions provenance separation
candidate and last-verified 40-character commit binding with exact rollback target
canonical repository-relative changed-path opaque root and deterministic surface/impact classification
protected canary derived from runtime, data-contract, control-plane, production-orchestration and supply-chain impacts

candidate commit, rollback commit, immutable pin, hash lock, SBOM, reproducible build, provenance, full test, dependency audit, High/Critical, Secret, scope, frozen-baseline and synthetic-recovery gates
capacity Green/Yellow/Unknown/Red distinction, active Kill hold, fresh public evidence, Full Reconciliation, protected Recovery, benefit-over-cost and exact one-live-Timeline gates
deterministic remediation instructions that perform no operation
aggregate-only decision with changed paths redacted behind an opaque root and every external effect fixed to zero
read-only no-Secret Patch Lifecycle policy preflight workflow
truthful LOCAL_MECHANISMS_READY but BLOCKED protected evidence
non_goals: provisioning or evaluating a real protected patch candidate or external check provenance
running a protected canary, incident, Recovery Drill, deployment or rollback
reading a Secret, Gmail, private repository, encrypted object or source-message content
writing a repository, Release, Issue, Workflow, Feature Flag, public evidence or production Kill state
changing the current Processed pointer, Timeline Asset, Mutation Budget or Gmail state
claiming T0707 completion, protected operations, AC-021/031/032/034 PASS or Stage 7 completion
modifying the frozen Stage 0 evidence validator, task graph, taskpack or production workflow
performing the final whole-package review or review remediation in this run
protected_oracles: T0707 owner Recovery Key three-role drill accepted as the protected predecessor
exact protected candidate commit, last verified commit and rollback commit verified as Git objects
immutable Action and container pins, complete hash lock, reproducible SBOM/build and build provenance verified outside candidate-controlled claims
full cumulative tests, dependency audit, Secret scan, scope scan and frozen-baseline scan pass with open High/Critical findings zero
fresh production operations evidence has Green or explicitly constrained Yellow capacity, no active Kill, clean Full Reconciliation, one live Timeline Asset and benefit over cost
sensitive impact protected canary passes without expanding Feature Flags or Mutation Budget
failed candidate demonstrably keeps the exact last verified commit and performs zero patch, rollback, Gmail, private-repository and Feature Flag effects
successful candidate receives separate owner approval before any separately governed deployment workflow
final AC-021, AC-031, AC-032 and AC-034 protected verdicts
ordering_blocker: T0708 depends on protected T0707, while the no-intermediate-upload rule prevents the GitHub-hosted observation chain required to complete T0705 through T0707. The local policy workflow can only validate public code and synthetic policy; no protected candidate, canary or patch effect may enter this run until the owner authorizes a delivery order consistent with both constraints.
rollback: Revert the local T0708 Patch Lifecycle policy commit to bbb6ba22c0c50a5f2f55f06d4416c8f8e5b83b57; no patch, rollback, Feature Flag, Secret, private object or remote resource has changed.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the frozen T0708 verification command cannot accept the required Stage 7 evidence schema without changing a baseline file
a Local Synthetic value is used as protected candidate, canary, external check provenance or AC-021/031/032/034 evidence
a changed path can escape MooMooAU scope or reach another project without a blocking reason
a sensitive patch can avoid the protected canary through caller-supplied classification
a rollback target can use a branch, tag, moving ref or value different from the exact last verified commit
the policy or workflow can deploy, roll back, mutate a Feature Flag, access Secret/private/Gmail data or write remote state
Unknown/Red capacity, an active Kill, stale evidence, reconciliation gap, failed Recovery, non-one Timeline, High/Critical, Secret or scope finding can produce a ready decision
the remote observation ordering blocker requires authority not granted in this run
